top.title: Trump buys time for Iran deal after frantic day of diplomacy
top.summary: The US president's decision marked the second time in as many weeks he has backed off a threat to escalate the war, buying more time.

top.title: EU approves €90bn loan for Ukraine as pipeline is turned on ending deadlock
top.summary: Ukraine says it has reopened the Druzhba pipeline, after months of stalemate over stalled oil supplies to neighbouring Hungary.

top.title: Lufthansa cuts 20,000 summer flights as fuel prices surge
top.summary: The airline is the latest to cut flights as the US-Israel war with Iran sends jet fuel prices soaring.

top.title: Xbox cuts prices for Game Pass but ends day-one Call of Duty access
top.summary: New Call of Duty games will be added to the subscription service "about a year" after release, Microsoft said.

top.title: Anthropic investigating claim of unauthorised access to Mythos AI tool
top.summary: The AI company has said the model is too dangerous to release publicly because of its hacking capabilities.

top.title: UK gaming icon Peter Molyneux on AI, his final creation and a changing industry
top.summary: The creator of iconic series such as Fable says Masters of Albion will be the last game he makes.
